sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6655" key="a)nakainourge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακαινουργέω</orth>, <sense id="n6655.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνακαινίζω</ref></xr>, prob. l. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
